subject: Re: FW: Introduction: Ayrton Mansi | Broadbeach Development Project
snippet: Hi Ryan, I have been discussing with Cory from Knightsbridge on next steps moving forward, and they will assist with the legals and see if we can put something together. I am fine for you to discuss
